description_long: This rifle features a long, cylindrical black metal barrel with a prominent round drum magazine mounted on top near the rear. The stock and pistol grip are made of wood, providing a classic contrast to the otherwise metallic construction. The rifle is equipped with a bipod attached near the front of the barrel, allowing for stabilized firing from a prone or supported position. The iron sights are visible, with a simple front post and rear notch configuration. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with exposed mechanical components and a rugged finish. The combination of wood and metal materials gives it a vintage, military appearance.
description: A long, black metal rifle with a wooden stock and grip, featuring a top-mounted drum magazine and a front bipod. The design is rugged and vintage, with visible iron sights and mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular opening of the barrel, the bipod legs, and the round drum magazine on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the wooden stock and grip, the drum magazine, and the bipod.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden stock, the back of the drum magazine, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the barrel, stock, drum magazine, and bipod.
